subject: HETE Alert 4006: MASTER promt optical limit
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <gcncirc@observ.inetcomm.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, V.Kornilov, A.Krylov, D.Kuvshinov, N.Tyurina, A.Belinski,
E.Gorbovskoy, G.Antipov, V.Vladimirov, A.Sankovich, N.Shatsky

Sternberg Astronomical Institute, Moscow Union 'Optic'

Very Wide Field Camera of the MASTER  robotic system
(http://observ.pereplet.ru, 63.1x47.3 square degrees) imaged  HETE
fields-of-view before and after Probable GRB 060118 (TRIGGER_NUM:4006,
GRB_TIME: 85556.51 SOD {23:45:56.51} UT).

We analysed  images (3 s exposition, unfiltred)  before, during and
after  alert time.
There is no OT brighter than 8m (unfiltred, under the very cold Moscow
Moon night).

JPG-images are  available at:

http://observ.pereplet.ru/images/GRB060118/before.jpg
http://observ.pereplet.ru/images/GRB060118/after.jpg

This work is supported by RFFI  04-02-16411 grant.
This message can be cited.
Mailto: lipunov@sai.msu.ru
